text.title: Test Pyramid vs Testing Trophy: Per-Module Decision Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Repo has ≥5 modules AND ≥1 painful test-suite event in last 90d?

branch.question: Does module qualify as mostly-pure-logic AND change-frequency <= monthly?

text.example: Preconditions hold and the fit check passes → execute the procedure end-to-end.
